sources.expression:
$wpdb->get_results( $wpdb->prepare( "select * from {$wpdb->prefix}cmplz_cookies where name = %s and language = %s and serviceID = %s ",
						$cookie->name, $language, $cookie->serviceID ) )

$wpdb->get_results(
				$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT DISTINCT en.purpose AS en_purpose, t.purpose AS target_purpose
					 FROM {$wpdb->prefix}cmplz_cookies en
					 INNER JOIN {$wpdb->prefix}cmplz_cookies t ON t.isTranslationFrom = en.ID
					 WHERE en.language = 'en'
					   AND t.language = %s
					   AND en.purpose != ''
					   AND t.purpose != ''
					   AND t.purpose != en.purpose",
					$language
				)
			)
$wpdb->get_results( "select * from {$wpdb->prefix}cmplz_cookiebanners as cb where cb.default = true" )
$wpdb->get_var( $wpdb->prepare( "select cdb.default from {$wpdb->prefix}cmplz_cookiebanners as cdb where cdb.ID=%s", $this->ID ) )
$wpdb->get_results( "select * from {$wpdb->prefix}cmplz_cookiebanners as cb where cb.default = false LIMIT 1" )
$wpdb->get_results( "select * from {$wpdb->prefix}cmplz_cookiebanners as cb where cb.default = true LIMIT 1" )
$wpdb->get_results( "select * from {$wpdb->prefix}cmplz_cookiebanners as cb where cb.default = true" )

$wpdb->get_results( $wpdb->prepare( "
				SELECT DISTINCT YEAR( post_date ) AS year, MONTH( post_date ) AS month
				FROM $wpdb->posts
				WHERE post_type = %s
				ORDER BY post_date DESC
			", 'attachment' ) )

$wpdb->get_results( $wpdb->prepare( "
			SELECT DISTINCT YEAR( post_date ) AS year, MONTH( post_date ) AS month
			FROM $wpdb->posts
			WHERE post_type = %s
			ORDER BY post_date DESC
			LIMIT 1
		", 'attachment' ) )

					get_class( $this ) ) )

wp_remote_post(
				self::WSC_ENDPOINT . '/api/lite/users',
				array(
					'headers'   => array(
						'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
					),
					'timeout'   => 15,
					'sslverify' => true,
					'body'      => wp_json_encode(
						array(
							'email'    => sanitize_email( $email ),
							'base_url' => esc_url_raw( admin_url() ),
							'partner'  => $partner_id,
						)
					),
				)
			)

wp_remote_post(
				self::WSC_ENDPOINT . '/oauth/token',
				array(
					'headers'   => array(
						'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
					),
					'timeout'   => 15,
					'sslverify' => true,
					'body'      => wp_json_encode(
						array(
							'grant_type'    => 'client_credentials',
							'client_id'     => $client_id,
							'client_secret' => $client_secret,
							'scope'         => 'write',
						)
					),
				)
			)

wp_remote_post(
				self::CONS_ENDPOINT,
				array(
					'headers'   => array(
						'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
						'ApiKey'       => self::CONS_ENDPOINT_PK,
					),
					'timeout'   => 15,
					'sslverify' => true,
					'body'      => $consent,
				)
			)

wp_remote_post(
				self::WSC_ENDPOINT . '/api/v2/sites',
				array(
					'headers'   => array(
						'Content-Type'  => 'application/json',
						'Authorization' => 'Bearer ' . $token,
					),
					'timeout'   => 15,
					'sslverify' => true,
					'body'      => wp_json_encode( $body ),
				)
			)

wp_die(sprintf('%s is a singleton class and you cannot create a second instance.',
					get_class($this)))
wp_die(sprintf('%s is a singleton class and you cannot create a second instance.', get_class($this)))

sanitizers.expression: wp_kses_post( sprintf( __( 'Hi, you have been using Complianz | GDPR cookie consent for a month now, awesome! If you have a moment, please consider leaving a review on WordPress.org to spread the word. We greatly appreciate it! If you have any questions or feedback, leave us a %smessage%s.', 'complianz-gdpr' ), '', '') )

$wpdb->prepare( "select * from {$wpdb->prefix}cmplz_cookies where name = %s and language = %s and serviceID = %s ",
						$cookie->name, $language, $cookie->serviceID )

$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT DISTINCT en.purpose AS en_purpose, t.purpose AS target_purpose
					 FROM {$wpdb->prefix}cmplz_cookies en
					 INNER JOIN {$wpdb->prefix}cmplz_cookies t ON t.isTranslationFrom = en.ID
					 WHERE en.language = 'en'
					   AND t.language = %s
					   AND en.purpose != ''
					   AND t.purpose != ''
					   AND t.purpose != en.purpose",
					$language
				)
$wpdb->prepare( "select cdb.default from {$wpdb->prefix}cmplz_cookiebanners as cdb where cdb.ID=%s", $this->ID )

$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT * FROM $wpdb->posts WHERE (post_content LIKE %s OR post_content LIKE %s) AND post_status = 'publish' AND post_type = 'page' ",
					'%' . '[cmplz-document' . '%',
					'%' . 'wp:complianz\/document' . '%'
				)

$wpdb->prepare( "
				SELECT DISTINCT YEAR( post_date ) AS year, MONTH( post_date ) AS month
				FROM $wpdb->posts
				WHERE post_type = %s
				ORDER BY post_date DESC
			", 'attachment' )

$wpdb->prepare( "
			SELECT DISTINCT YEAR( post_date ) AS year, MONTH( post_date ) AS month
			FROM $wpdb->posts
			WHERE post_type = %s
			ORDER BY post_date DESC
			LIMIT 1
		", 'attachment' )
